description: Returns the provided object's model centre position ([0,0,0]) in [[Position#PositionASL|PositionASL]], rather than the transformed [[boundingCenter]] or [[Oxygen_2_-_Manual#LandContact|LandContact]] vertices.
examples:
Wave height under a boat:
<sqf>private _h = ((boat modelToWorld [0,0,0]) vectorDiff getPosWorld boat) select 2;</sqf>
name: getPosWorld
